tasks.description: The graph pipeline produces stable lane, color, and segment output for identical commit/ref input.
steps: Identical input reports stable lane count and segment count across multiple runs

tasks.description: Benchmark and regression scripts measure the same layout implementation used by the app rather than a copied variant.
steps: npx tsx scripts/perf-bench.ts runs against imported shared graph logic
No duplicated lane-assignment implementation remains in the benchmark path
pnpm check passes after script alignment

patterns: Graph pipeline: src/lib/graph/layout.ts — pure assignLanes() entry point
Shared types: src/lib/graph/types.ts — immutable graph contracts
nonGoals: Canvas rendering, viewport culling, or FPS overlay work
Manual validation on a real 10k+ repository
Adding a frontend test framework or new dependency
Replacing the greedy first-parent lane strategy
